BOOM! What's up my friends? It is good to see you. I'm excited. Let's officially kick this off now that I got past all the nitty-gritty announcements Hey, I'm pumped for today Okay, first off I want to start right off with the story and teach you guys something. It should really help you guys. I am I'm an overnight seven-year success story, right? Just like a lot of us. It takes us a long time to get success off of this stuff I went 12 business tries without any funnel knowledge and when I finally learned about funnels I It was like two or three tries later that I was making more money than I've ever seen in my life And it wasn't millions, but it was more than my wife had ever seen and it replaced a lot of what I was getting paid at my jobs Around business try eight You know You start getting the questions, right? Steven is this the one that's gonna work? And you can't blame anybody for asking me that and and I get it and and often time It's because we can't describe or explain well. What is it? Right as part of it to increase the value. I got two ways to compete I can drop my price or I can increase my value. I'd rather not drop price So I'm always gonna go and I'm gonna increase value by solving more follow-up problems now. How do I sell it? I sell it by thinking through Where is my dream customer right now? I could be customer my dream customer. Where are they right now? What are the emotions they're feeling? What are the pains they're experiencing already? I don't need to create pain I don't need to create emotion there's enough of that in this world and they're probably already feeling some of it So what is it already and then I'm gonna go in and then I'm gonna go in and I'm going to think through what they've or what they're going through in their life and Think through things that have happened in my life. I have had loved ones ask me is this the one that's gonna work Right, I have had people ask me oh Steven. How about you take me out to lunch? Let me give you an example here. This is also fake Okay, this is also fake. Let me just tell you right now, okay? Okay all made up Here's why story works so well Here's why you need to learn this and here's why your product will not sell itself. It's not what I imagined Guys the power of story is this I can tell a story And I can I can use all of the things in my own life Okay to paint a picture, but the picture that's painted is different in each of the hearers heads Okay, so this is the benefit right here They have the benefit of going through the emotion the hardship the struggle of the story Without actually having to go through it itself They can experience it as if they really did go through it Okay, as if they really did sit in McDonald's dollar menu and have their spouse ask them is this the one as if what was the street? I was walking down when I walked up to that old man at the limo. I know what street it is in my head You imagined a street. It's not the one I imagined. I didn't tell you what your one I was okay. I didn't tell you what the old man looked like I know exactly what the old man looks like and I know what he's wearing in my head I don't know what his watch looks like in my head, but it's different. You see I'm saying Okay, there is a power in storytelling that plays off the histories and the emotions and the experiences of each person to craft the scene in the person's head Okay, so they have the benefit of experiencing Dramatic things whether it's high drama happy doesn't need to be like sad and doom and gloom all the time Okay, but whatever it is the emotion is that you're trying to evoke inside of the story. They will paint the scene in their head Okay, that's the power of it. Okay, and what I do is 80 percent story 20 percent nugget right 80 percent story 20 percent Content or tip or whatever and when I wrap the nugget or the content of the tip or the whatever in the story When it's wrapped inside of the story then it delivers then they hear it then like oh it opens the gap for me to install the nugget Okay So when someone says to you like oh and you're showing your product to somebody and you tell them their product and like oh That's kind of cool, and you're like no no like you don't get it It's because you haven't told them a story This is the answer to that. It's this it's this it's this two steps forward three steps back kind of feeling that you have throughout the movie for a while Again, he finally gets to go over and compete for the piston cup as he's about to win Right, which is an achievement of itself that he gets back to it So we do feel a sense of achievement as he's about to win right lightning the Queen is gonna go across the finish line He stops right in front of the finish line Goes back and pushes across his buddy instead That without that it would just be a pretty good movie Without the transformation we see inside of lightning the Queen We wouldn't care that much about the achievement What does he say?
